CustomField.formula: CASE (ELLISPHERE__Elli_Tch_RiskClass__c, 'A',IMAGE('https://alliancedesenergies.my.site.com/partenaire/resource/ELLISPHERE__ImagesEllisphere/Ellisphere_images/risque_faible_nul.png','Risque faible à quasi-nul',16,161), 'GREEN',IMAGE('https://alliancedesenergies.my.site.com/partenaire/resource/ELLISPHERE__ImagesEllisphere/Ellisphere_images/risque_faible_nul.png','Risque faible à quasi-nul',16,161), 'B',IMAGE('https://alliancedesenergies.my.site.com/partenaire/resource/ELLISPHERE__ImagesEllisphere/Ellisphere_images/risque_moyen_faible.png','Risque moyen à faible',16,161), 'YELLOW',IMAGE('https://alliancedesenergies.my.site.com/partenaire/resource/ELLISPHERE__ImagesEllisphere/Ellisphere_images/risque_moyen_faible.png','Risque moyen à faible',16,161), 'C',IMAGE('https://alliancedesenergies.my.site.com/partenaire/resource/ELLISPHERE__ImagesEllisphere/Ellisphere_images/risque_moyen_eleve.png','risque moyen à élevé',16,161), 'ORANGE',IMAGE('https://alliancedesenergies.my.site.com/partenaire/resource/ELLISPHERE__ImagesEllisphere/Ellisphere_images/risque_moyen_eleve.png','risque moyen à élevé',16,161), 'D',IMAGE('https://alliancedesenergies.my.site.com/partenaire/resource/ELLISPHERE__ImagesEllisphere/Ellisphere_images/risque_tres_eleve.png','risque très avéré',16,161), 'RED',IMAGE('https://alliancedesenergies.my.site.com/partenaire/resource/ELLISPHERE__ImagesEllisphere/Ellisphere_images/risque_tres_eleve.png','risque très avéré',16,161), 'E',IMAGE('https://alliancedesenergies.my.site.com/partenaire/resource/ELLISPHERE__ImagesEllisphere/Ellisphere_images/risque_avere.png','Risque avéré',16,161), 'BLACK',IMAGE('https://alliancedesenergies.my.site.com/partenaire/resource/ELLISPHERE__ImagesEllisphere/Ellisphere_images/risque_avere.png','Risque avéré',16,161), "n/a")
CustomField.label: Classe de risque
